target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle appears intact with no visible holes, scorching, or blown-off components; all major structural elements present and undamaged.

summary: One military equipment target assessed: NO DAMAGE, CONFIRMED. The scene depicts two soldiers in combat gear near a large, armored military vehicle with its rear ramp open; a dark green liquid stain is visible on the ground beneath the vehicle. The prior assessment indicates the vehicle is undamaged, suggesting no immediate functional impact from any strike.
